name: country
description: Priority country (country of the first priority document in a patent family, generally used as the primary country designator for patents).

name: country_rank
description: Rank of a priority country by the number of patent families in a cluster.

name: NPF_country
description: Number of patent families from the priority country in a cluster.

name: NPF_top10_countries
description: Number of patent families in a cluster from one of the top 10 priority countries.

name: NPF_missing_all_countries
description: Number of patent families in a cluster where all priority countries are missing.
